ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tube_assemblies" (
  "tube_assembly_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tube assembly type */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier providing the quote */,
  "quote_date" TEXT /* Date when the quote was received */,
  "annual_usage" INTEGER /* Estimated annual usage of this tube assembly */,
  "min_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity required by the supplier */,
  "material" TEXT /* Type of material used in the tube assembly */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the tube assembly */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the tube assembly */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the tube assembly */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number assigned by the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tube assembly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tube_assembly_id", "supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for supplier communications */,
  "rating" REAL /* Supplier performance rating based on historical data */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the supplier is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency for transactions with the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Average lead time for delivery */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Standard payment terms for the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotes" (
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quote */,
  "tube_assembly_id" TEXT /* ID of the tube assembly for which the quote is provided */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the quote */,
  "quote_date" TEXT /* Date when the quote was issued */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity for which the quote is valid */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the tube assembly at the specified quantity */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the quote is provided */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the quoted quantity */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the quoted quantity */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* Date until which the quote is valid */,
  "terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the quote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_tube_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("tube_assembly_id") REFERENCES tube_assemblies ("tube_assembly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier from whom the order is placed */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of tube assemblies ordered */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the order is placed */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the order (e.g., unpaid, paid, partial) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "tube_assembly_id" TEXT /* ID of the tube assembly in inventory */,
  "quantity_on_hand" INTEGER /* Current quantity of tube assemblies on hand */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which reorder should be triggered */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, storage area) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_status" TEXT /* Status of the reorder (e.g., not needed, pending, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procurement_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procurement history record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with procurement */,
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quote accepted for procurement */,
  "procurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the procurement decision was made */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the procurement was made */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the procurement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the procurement (e.g., completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_history_quote_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_id") REFERENCES quotes ("quote_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_terms" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier associated with the contract */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the contract */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract is up for renewal */,
  "renewal_terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions for contract renewal */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract can be terminated */,
  "termination_terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions for contract termination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_terms_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier being evaluated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating score based on performance */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding supplier performance */,
  "delivery_on_time" REAL /* Percentage of deliveries made on time */,
  "quality_rating" REAL /* Quality rating of the supplier's products */,
  "service_rating" REAL /* Service rating provided by the supplier */,
  "reliability_rating" REAL /* Reliability rating of the supplier */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the performance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_performance_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_brackets" (
  "bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing bracket */,
  "tube_assembly_id" TEXT /* ID of the tube assembly associated with the bracket */,
  "min_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity range for the price */,
  "max_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum quantity range for the price */,
  "price" REAL /* Price for the specified quantity range */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is provided */,
  "terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions for the pricing bracket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bracket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_brackets_tube_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("tube_assembly_id") REFERENCES tube_assemblies ("tube_assembly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization (e.g., buyer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., procurement, finance) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* User's access level (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
